Class Employee

java.lang.Object
schoolrecords.Person
schoolrecords.Employee
Direct Known Subclasses:
Faculty, Staff
public class Employee extends Person
Represents an employee, which is a type of Person. Extends the Person class and adds employee-specific information.

  • Constructor Summary

    • Employee

      public Employee(String name, String address, String phoneNumber, String emailAddress, String office, double salary, String dateHired)
      Constructor with all parameters.
      Parameters:
      name - the employee's name
      address - the employee's address
      phoneNumber - the employee's phone number
      emailAddress - the employee's email address
      office - the employee's office location
      salary - the employee's salary
      dateHired - the date the employee was hired
